metadata.name: Analyze Average Daily Gain in Feedlot Cattle

description: A feedlot manager wants to analyze the performance of a pen of cattle by calculating their average daily gain (ADG).

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the initial weight and date for all cattle in the specified pen.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the starting weight data.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the most recent weight and date for the same group of cattle.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the ending weight data.

nodes.task_description: For each animal, calculate the average daily gain (ADG).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent calculates the ADG for every animal in the pen.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report showing the average ADG for the pen and flag any individual animals that are performing significantly below average.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a report and identifies 3 animals with poor performance for further inspection.
